final:
module freq_divider (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg out
);
    reg [2:0] cnt; // 3-bit counter to cnt to 8

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            cnt <= 3'b000;
            out <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            if (cnt == 3'b111) begin
                out <= ~out; // toggle output
                cnt <= 3'b000; // reset cnt
            end else begin
                cnt <= cnt + 1; // increment cnt
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
